subSegments.text: Roles emphasizing financial discipline, analytics, and leadership. Full detail on the

positions.title: Strategy & Insights Analyst Intern
bullets: Analyzed survey data from 10,000+ respondents in R; surfaced demographic and behavioral trends for national public-opinion reports and executive-ready narratives.
Designed and deployed 3 interactive Power BI dashboards and 10+ visual reports; improved accessibility of insights and reduced analysis time about 30%.
Cleaned and validated 1,200+ survey responses with R scripts; raised dataset integrity for reliable performance and client reporting.

positions.title: Founder & CEO
bullets: Founded and scaled a cross-platform product; exited via acquisition — validating positioning, capital efficiency, and go-to-market execution.
Raised $10,000 pre-seed from angel investors; owned budgeting, roadmap alignment, and resource allocation across a 10-person cross-functional team.
Grew Satyam (satyam.app) to nearly 5,000 followers and nearly 1 million views; built reach alongside product and community strategy.
Launched to early adopters with initial revenue; integrated AI capabilities to support retention and growth strategy.

positions.title: President
bullets: Secured $30,000+ through grants, donor outreach, and fundraising; obtained 501(c)(3) status to expand long-term funding and compliance posture.
Built partnerships with international research institutes; led 50+ members through strategic planning, cost reduction initiatives, and operations.
Presented water purification research at an international science conference; engaged global researchers and practitioners.

positions.title: Treasurer
bullets: Managed a $15,000+ budget with transparent controls and reporting for large-scale campus programming (2,000+ attendees).
Led legal and financial workstreams toward 501(c)(3) nonprofit status to unlock additional funding streams.

positions.title: Vice President
bullets: Coordinated volunteer programs and community events; grew attendance through partnerships and outreach (~70% YoY).
Led fundraising efforts that increased donations about 35% to support local shelters.
